title: Millionfold v0.1.3 Post-Run Summary Modal
content:
Millionfold has been updated to v0.1.3, introducing a detailed post-run summary popup overlay when processing completes.

Key additions:

  • Job Completion Modal: Automatically displays a clean, brutalist-styled modal listing final stats (processed files, successes, and errors) and the exact configuration selected (input/output paths, rename pattern, canvas transformations, zip export details).
  • ZIP Path Exposure: Explicitly renders the generated export ZIP archive path for easy retrieval.
  • State Synchronization: Tracks progress details and zip creation directly in the React state to present accurate metrics.
